rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex syntax elements, such as 'annex' or '}'
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside 'annex agree {** ... **};' blocks
Use 'eq name : type = expression;' for helper declarations
anti_patterns: Do not delete valid clauses to resolve diagnostics; fix the root cause instead
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
